headline: Dennis J. Wilson Files Definitive Proxy Statement with the Securities and Exchange Commission
summary: On May 1, 2026, Dennis J. Wilson announced that he has filed a definitive proxy statement with the Securities and Exchange Commission, seeking the support of lululemon athletica inc.?s shareholders...

headline: The Weekly Closeout: Heydude sales decline and Lululemon dishes about Chip Wilson
summary: The Crocs-owned footwear brand reported a 12% sales decline, while the athletics company spelled out a fraught relationship in proxy documents.
